name: Sir Reginald Flufflebottom III, Esq., Destroyer of Brunch
text:
When Sir Reginald enters the battlefield, roll a six-sided die. On a 4 or higher, gently knock the nearest object off a table.
Whenever Sir Reginald attacks, the loudest player at the table loses 1 life. You decide who is loudest. You are extremely biased.
High-five a friend: Sir Reginald gains flying until you two stop being friends.
flavorText: He has never paid for brunch. He never will.
